phase-summary.outcome: Space Explorer now includes a reusable Codex authoring chat panel wired to a server endpoint with feature-flag gating, establishing the in-app conversational entrypoint for subsequent mutation/canonical/bundle tasks.

file.description: Added reusable chat UI component for authoring workflows.
Added feature-flag-aware server route and model response generation path.
Mounted reusable chat panel and connected current authoring context.

tests.test: docs-site typecheck passes with reusable chat component + API route integration.

suggestion.gap: No explicit requirement enforces reusable chat implementation.
suggestion.proposal: Require reusable chat authoring components for all content-authoring surfaces.

next.action: Execute 50-09 to convert chat output into validated model/stat/schema mutations.
